title: Voices of the Night
description: A horror experience in Minecraft, try to survive the new dangers that lurk in the shadows.
body:
![VOTN Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0beff0d1badf8e2d51865417167b78f70246408e.png)

Survive the attack of the beast that hunts its prey at night. Listen to the cries of your victims and know to stay away, or you will face the consequences. However, if you are brave or crazy enough, try to face him and claim his head as a prize.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zHINbJ31cI0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod adds a new dangerous monster that lives in Dark Forests and Taigas, as well as small creatures that speak in human voices to warn you about the dangers of that environment. Also, this is my very first horror mod, I look forward to your feedback. 

"GeckoLib" is required.



This is a project created by the Blocksmith Creations team.
Check out our other projects and check out our YouTube channel:
https://www.youtube.com/@BlocksmithCreations
